Package microui.core.base

Class ContainerManager

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.ContainerManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeyPressable, Scrollable, Visible
public final class ContainerManager extends View implements Scrollable, KeyPressable
Singleton manager for handling multiple Container instances and providing animation transitions between them. Manages the lifecycle, rendering, and event handling for containers in a GUI application.

This class implements the Singleton pattern and is responsible for: - Managing a collection of Container objects - Handling transitions between containers with various animation effects - Propagating keyboard and mouse events to the active container - Managing tooltips and debug information

Status: STABLE - Do not modify Last Reviewed: 8.11.2025

See Also:
  • Container
  • ContainerManager.AnimatorMode

  • Method Details

    • render

      public void render()
      Renders the current state of the ContainerManager. If animator is enabled, uses animator for drawing; otherwise draws current container directly.

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Draws the ContainerManager and debug information if enabled.
      Overrides:
      draw in class View
      Throws:
      RenderException - if draw() is called manually without FLEXIBLE render mode

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed()
      Handles key press events by propagating them to the current container.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyPressable

    • keyPressed

      public void keyPressed(processing.event.KeyEvent e)
      Handles key press events with KeyEvent details by propagating them to the current container.
      Specified by:
      keyPressed in interface KeyPressable
      Parameters:
      e - the key event

    • keyEvent

      public void keyEvent(processing.event.KeyEvent keyEvent)
      Processes key events from the Processing environment. Handles debug hotkeys and propagates events to keyboard manager and containers.
      Parameters:
      keyEvent - the key event from Processing
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if keyEvent is null

    • mouseWheel

      public void mouseWheel(processing.event.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
      Handles mouse wheel events by propagating them to the current container.
      Specified by:
      mouseWheel in interface Scrollable
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the mouse wheel event

    • mouseEvent

      public void mouseEvent(processing.event.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
      Processes mouse events from the Processing environment. Currently only handles mouse wheel events.
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the mouse event from Processing

      public ContainerManager.AnimatorMode getAnimatorMode()
      Returns the current animator mode.

    • getAnimatorSpeed

      public float getAnimatorSpeed()
      Returns the raw animation speed.
      Returns:
      the raw animation speed value

    • setAnimatorSpeed

      public void setAnimatorSpeed(float speed)
      Sets the animation speed.
      Parameters:
      speed - the speed to set (must be greater than 0)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if speed is less than or equal to 0

    • isAnimatorEasingEnabled

      public boolean isAnimatorEasingEnabled()
      Checks if easing is enabled for animations.
      Returns:
      true if easing is enabled, false otherwise

    • setAnimatorEasingEnabled

      public void setAnimatorEasingEnabled(boolean easing)
      Enables or disables easing for animations.
      Parameters:
      easing - true to enable easing, false to disable

    • isAnimatorEnabled

      public boolean isAnimatorEnabled()
      Checks if the animator is enabled.
      Returns:
      true if animator is enabled, false otherwise

    • setAnimatorEnabled

      public void setAnimatorEnabled(boolean animatorEnabled)
      Enables or disables the animator for container transitions.
      Parameters:
      animatorEnabled - true to enable animator, false to disable

    • findById

      public Container findById(int id)
      Searches for a container by its numeric ID.

      id - the numeric ID to search for
      Returns:
      the container with the specified ID, or null if not found

    • getById

      public Container getById(int id)
      Retrieves a container by its numeric ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the numeric ID of the container to retrieve
      Returns:
      the container with the specified ID
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if no container with the specified ID is found

    • findByTextId

      public Container findByTextId(String textId)
      Searches for a container by its text ID.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text ID to search for (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      the container with the specified text ID, or null if not found
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if textId is null

    • getByTextId

      public Container getByTextId(String textId)
      Retrieves a container by its text ID.
      Parameters:
      textId - the text ID of the container to retrieve (cannot be null)
      Returns:
      the container with the specified text ID
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if textId is null
      NoSuchElementException - if no container with the specified text ID is found
